seo.title: New York Dental Assistant License (2026) | Requirements & Fees
seo.description: Complete guide to dental assistant licensing in New York — endorsement steps, fees, DANB certification, and radiography permits.
seo.keywords: dental assistant license new york, dental assistant certification new york, RDA new york, DANB CDA new york, dental assistant radiography new york

license_types.title: Certified Dental Assistant
license_types.description: The primary credential for dental assistants in New York.

steps.title: Meet Basic Requirements
steps.description: You must be of good moral character and at least 17 years of age, as well as have graduated from high school or its equivalent.

steps.title: Complete Required Coursework
steps.description: Complete coursework in infection control and barrier precautions and child abuse reporting.

steps.title: Apply for Registration
steps.description: Submit an application for registration and pay the $60 fee to the New York State Education Department.

documents.detail: Certificate from CODA-accredited program or documentation of on-the-job training hours.
Official CDA certification from the Dental Assisting National Board, if applicable.
Proof of radiography competency/certification required for taking x-rays.

provisional_text: Some states allow dental assistants to work under direct supervision while obtaining required certifications or completing training.
reciprocity_text: Dental assistants can apply for Certified Dental Assistant through the New York State Education Department by certification.

faqs.question: Does New York require a dental assistant license?
faqs.answer: Yes, New York requires Certified Dental Assistant through the state board.

faqs.question: Is DANB certification recognized in New York?
faqs.answer: Yes, DANB CDA certification is recognized and often preferred by employers in New York.

faqs.question: Can I take dental x-rays in New York?
faqs.answer: Yes, but a radiography permit or certification is required.

faqs.question: How much does it cost to become a dental assistant in New York?
faqs.answer: State application fees are $60. Additional costs may include DANB CDA exam ($450), radiography certification, and background check fees.

reciprocity.notes: Dental assistants can apply for Certified Dental Assistant through the New York State Education Department by certification.

hero.title: Become a Dental Assistant in New York
hero.dek: New York Dental Assistant registration requires graduation from high school, completion of required infection control and child abuse reporting coursework, and biennial registration renewal.
